zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan Bardolf於1390年11月11日出生在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾時，她的父親Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf20歲，母親Anice de Cromwell27歲。她於1407年與Sir William Phelip ,Knight在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1447年3月12日在英國素福爾可丹寧頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾惠特比聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan Bardolf于1390年11月11日出生在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾时，她的父亲Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf20岁，母亲Anice de Cromwell27岁。她于1407年与Sir William Phelip ,Knight在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1447年3月12日在英国素福爾可丹寧頓享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾惠特比聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Bardolf was born on 11 November 1390, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf, was 20 and her mother, Anice de Cromwell, was 27. She married Sir William Phelip ,Knight in 1407, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 12 March 1447, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in St Mary the Virgin Churchyard, Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Bardolf est née le 11 novembre 1390, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Anice de Cromwell, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Phelip ,Knight en 1407, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1447, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary the Virgin Churchyard, Whitby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan Bardolf am 11. November 1390 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf 20 und ihre Mutter Anice de Cromwell 27. Sie hat 1407 in Norfolk, England Sir William Phelip ,Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. März 1447 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Dennington, Suffolk, England und wurde in St Mary the Virgin Churchyard, Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Bardolfが1390年11月11日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで生まれた時，父Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolfは20歳，母Anice de Cromwellは27歳であった。1407年にイギリスノーフォルクでSir William Phelip ,Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1447年3月12日にイギリススフォルクデニントンで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビースト マリー ス バージン チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Bardolf(이)가 1390년 11월 11일 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anice de Cromwell(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1407년 영국 노르폴크에서 Sir William Phelip ,Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1447년 3월 12일 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 휘트비 스트 메리 테 버긴 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Bardolf nasceu em 11 de novembro de 1390, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Anice de Cromwell, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Phelip ,Knight em 1407, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de março de 1447, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary the Virgin Churchyard, Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan Bardolf родилась 11 ноября 1390 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Anice de Cromwell, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Phelip ,Knight в 1407 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 марта 1447 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри т виргин чурчярд, уитби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joan Bardolf nació el 11 de noviembre de 1390, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Bardolf 5th Baron Bardolf, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Anice de Cromwell, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir William Phelip ,Knight en 1407, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1447, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary the Virgin Churchyard, Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
